title: Update Habibur Rahman Babul's photo with uploaded real portrait

requirements.summary: Replace Habibur Rahman Babul's photo with the uploaded portrait (3-8.jpeg) and save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/habibur-rahman-babul.dim_400x500.png, then update all references in AboutPage.tsx and HomePage.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded portrait of Habibur Rahman Babul (white shirt, white background, face fully visible and centered) is displayed in the team section on both the About page and Home page.
The image file is saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/habibur-rahman-babul.dim_400x500.png.
No other team member's photo is affected.
The image renders correctly at all viewport sizes without cropping the head.

file_operations.description: Save the cropped and optimized portrait from the uploaded image 3-8.jpeg. The image shows a middle-aged South Asian man with grey mustache in a white shirt against a white background, with face fully centered and full head visible. Dimensions: 400x500 pixels.

Update the team member photo reference for Habibur Rahman Babul (founder) from the current path to /assets/generated/habibur-rahman-babul.dim_400x500.png. Verify the image is rendered in the team section without affecting other team members' photos or any other page content.

Update the team member photo reference for Habibur Rahman Babul from the current path to /assets/generated/habibur-rahman-babul.dim_400x500.png. Ensure the image displays correctly in the team preview section without modifying other sections (hero, courses, gallery) or other team members' photos.
